creator: tobias@astrom.xyz
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #7)

I can open/save xcf files, but not export them to any other formats.

It seems to be script-fu related, output from gimp:

INIT: gimp_real_restore
Parsing '/home/tobias/.gimp-2.8/pluginrc'
Starting extension: 'extension-script-fu'

(script-fu:76268): LibGimp-ERROR **: shmat() failed: Invalid argument
Could not attach to gimp shared memory segment

(gimp:76265): LibGimpBase-WARNING **: gimp: gimp_wire_read(): error
Terminating plug-in: '/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/script-fu'
GIMP-Error: Plug-in crashed: "script-fu"
(/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/script-fu)

The dying plug-in may have messed up GIMP's internal state. You may want to save your images and restart GIMP to be on the safe side.
